stimulus: Many ancient ceramic vessels are missing their handles. This is because the handle is the most ______blank part of a ceramic vessel. It is thin and sticks out from the body of the vessel, making it especially easy to snap off.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical and precise word or phrase?
rationale: Choice C is the best answer because the text explains that the handle is thin and easily snapped off, which supports the meaning of "fragile" (easily broken). Choice A is incorrect because being recognizable does not explain why the handle would be missing. Choice B is incorrect because being sophisticated does not relate to breakage. Choice D is incorrect because being common does not explain why the part is missing from many vessels.
